name: Zotye Automobile Co., Ltd
summary: Zotye Automobile Co., Ltd engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of automobiles in China, Iran, Chile, Russia, and internationally. It offers sedan, SUVs, MPVs, and new energy vehicles. The company also provides parts of new energy cars and engines; transmission products; batteries; motors; and electronic control products. It offers its products primarily under the Zotye, Jiangnan, and Traum brands. The company was formerly known as Anhui Zotye Automobile Co., Ltd and changed its name to Zotye Automobile Co., Ltd in November 2017. The company was founded in 1998 is based in Huangshan, China.
